variables.description: Number of identical active parallel hydraulic branches.
variables.label: Parallel path count
variables.name: parallel_path_count

variables.description: Illuminated straight centreline length per branch.
variables.label: Branch illuminated straight length
variables.name: branch_illuminated_straight_length

variables.description: Dark straight centreline length per branch.
variables.label: Branch dark straight length
variables.name: branch_dark_straight_length

variables.description: Identical bend count per branch; cross-field rules are enforced by the bundled model.
variables.label: Branch bend count
variables.name: branch_bend_count

variables.description: Illuminated bends per branch, bounded by branch bend count at runtime.
variables.label: Illuminated branch bend count
variables.name: branch_illuminated_bend_count

variables.description: Common centreline radius for represented branch bends; zero for a zero-bend branch.
variables.label: Branch bend centreline radius
variables.name: branch_bend_centerline_radius

variables.description: Included angle of every represented branch bend; zero for a zero-bend branch.
variables.label: Branch bend angle
variables.name: branch_bend_angle

variables.description: Common supply centreline length before the split.
variables.label: Common supply length
variables.name: common_supply_length

variables.description: Common return centreline length after the merge.
variables.label: Common return length
variables.name: common_return_length

variables.description: Hydraulic inner diameter of every branch.
variables.label: Branch tube inner diameter
variables.name: branch_tube_inner_diameter

variables.description: External diameter of every branch tube.
variables.label: Branch tube outer diameter
variables.name: branch_tube_outer_diameter

variables.description: Hydraulic inner diameter of common supply and return runs.
variables.label: Common tube inner diameter
variables.name: common_tube_inner_diameter

variables.description: External diameter of common supply and return runs.
variables.label: Common tube outer diameter
variables.name: common_tube_outer_diameter

variables.description: Explicit liquid holdup in the split manifold.
variables.label: Split manifold liquid volume
variables.name: split_manifold_liquid_volume

variables.description: Explicit liquid holdup in the merge manifold.
variables.label: Merge manifold liquid volume
variables.name: merge_manifold_liquid_volume

variables.description: Reservoir and pump-suction liquid holdup outside tubing and manifolds.
variables.label: Reservoir liquid volume
variables.name: reservoir_liquid_volume

variables.description: Target mean velocity inside each identical active branch.
variables.label: Target branch velocity
variables.name: target_branch_velocity

variables.description: Liquid density used by hydraulic calculations.
variables.label: Liquid density
variables.name: liquid_density

variables.description: Liquid dynamic viscosity used by Reynolds calculations.
variables.label: Dynamic viscosity
variables.name: dynamic_viscosity

variables.description: Overall pump electrical efficiency.
variables.label: Pump efficiency
variables.name: pump_efficiency

variables.description: Minor-loss coefficient for the common supply run, based on common velocity.
variables.label: Common supply loss coefficient
variables.name: common_supply_minor_loss_coefficient

variables.description: Split-manifold loss coefficient based on common inlet velocity.
variables.label: Split manifold loss coefficient
variables.name: split_manifold_loss_coefficient

variables.description: Loss coefficient per represented bend based on branch velocity; zero when bend count is zero.
variables.label: Branch bend loss coefficient per bend
variables.name: branch_bend_loss_coefficient_per_bend

variables.description: Other represented branch minor-loss coefficient based on branch velocity.
variables.label: Branch miscellaneous loss coefficient
variables.name: branch_misc_minor_loss_coefficient

variables.description: Merge-manifold loss coefficient based on common outlet velocity.
variables.label: Merge manifold loss coefficient
variables.name: merge_manifold_loss_coefficient

variables.description: Minor-loss coefficient for the common return run, based on common velocity.
variables.label: Common return loss coefficient
variables.name: common_return_minor_loss_coefficient
